nodes.name: toast.tsx
nodes.summary: Defines the full set of Radix UI-based toast primitive components — ToastProvider, ToastViewport, Toast, ToastAction, ToastClose, ToastTitle, and ToastDescription — styled with CVA variants (default and destructive) and TailwindCSS.
nodes.languageNotes: Uses React.forwardRef for all components, class-variance-authority for variant management, and re-exports Radix UI primitives with custom Tailwind styling.

nodes.name: toaster.tsx
nodes.summary: Renders the active toast notifications by consuming the useToast hook and mapping over the current toast state to display Toast, ToastTitle, ToastDescription, ToastClose, and ToastAction components.

nodes.name: Toaster
nodes.summary: React component that reads all active toasts from the useToast hook and renders them inside a ToastProvider and ToastViewport, including optional title, description, and action elements.

nodes.name: use-toast.ts
nodes.summary: Thin re-export barrel that proxies the useToast hook and toast imperative function from src/hooks/use-toast.ts, maintaining a shadcn-compatible import path at the UI component layer.

nodes.name: use-toast.ts
nodes.summary: Implements the complete client-side toast notification system: a Redux-style reducer managing ADD, UPDATE, DISMISS, and REMOVE actions against an in-memory singleton state, an imperative toast() factory function, and a useToast React hook that subscribes components to that state.
nodes.languageNotes: Uses a module-level singleton (memoryState + listeners array) instead of React context, allowing the toast() function to be called outside React components while still synchronizing with subscribed components via useEffect.

nodes.name: reducer
nodes.summary: Pure Redux-style reducer handling ADD_TOAST (prepend and slice to TOAST_LIMIT), UPDATE_TOAST (merge by id), DISMISS_TOAST (mark open=false and schedule removal), and REMOVE_TOAST (filter out by id) actions over the toast state array.

nodes.name: addToRemoveQueue
nodes.summary: Schedules a REMOVE_TOAST dispatch for a given toast ID after TOAST_REMOVE_DELAY milliseconds, using a Map to ensure only one timeout is registered per toast.

nodes.name: toast
nodes.summary: Imperative factory that creates a new toast by generating an ID, dispatching ADD_TOAST, and returning update/dismiss helpers — callable outside React components.

nodes.name: useToast
nodes.summary: React hook that subscribes to the module-level toast state via a listener, returns the current toasts array, the toast factory, and a dismiss helper.
